name: temperature-war
prompt: Wide two-shot. Silver-haired woman RIGHT of frame facing LEFT, cold flaring — frost visible around her, ice-blue eyes intense. Dark-haired young man LEFT of frame facing RIGHT, heat pushing back — amber glow, heat shimmer. Air between them crackling with visible temperature collision — frost meeting heat, steam rising. Storage room shelving around them. Charged confrontation. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: steam hissing where hot and cold air collide, pressure building
